Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-22-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. 1. Defendant Zita Philhashy's Motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents denied:
a. Defendant failed to submit Separate Statement in support of the subject motion;
b. Plaintiff ha provided verification of their previously unverified responses to discovery
2. Request for sanctions denied. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
